title: Campanopsis marginata
taxonomy: Campanopsis marginata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This family is commonly known as the bellflower family, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Northern Hemisphere. Campanopsis marginata is likely native to China, as it is a species found in the Chinese flora. The plant is characterized by its distinctive bell-shaped flowers and narrow, lance-shaped leaves. The classification of Campanopsis marginata is within the Campanulaceae family, which includes a wide range of flowering plants.
